info.name: Twilio - Proxy
info.description:
This is the public Twilio REST API.

Contact Support:
 Name: Twilio Support
 Email: support@twilio.com

variable.description: (Required) The SID of the parent [Service](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/service) of the resource to fetch.
(Required) The SID of the parent [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) of the resource to fetch.
(Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the Interaction resource to fetch.

request.description: Retrieve a list of Interactions for a given [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description: Fetch a specific Participant.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The SID of the parent [Service](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/service) of the resource to delete.
(Required) The SID of the parent [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) of the resource to delete.
(Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the Participant resource to delete.

request.description: Delete a specific Participant. This is a soft-delete. The participant remains associated with the session and cannot be re-added. Participants are only permanently deleted when the [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) is deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

(Required) The SID of the parent [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) of the resources to read.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all Participants in a Session.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

query.description: How many resources to return in each list page. The default is 50, and the maximum is 1000.
The page index. This value is simply for client state.
The page token. This is provided by the API.

urlencoded.description: (Required) The phone number of the Participant.
The string that you assigned to describe the participant. This value must be 255 characters or fewer. **This value should not have PII.**
The proxy phone number to use for the Participant. If not specified, Proxy will select a number from the pool.
The SID of the Proxy Identifier to assign to the Participant.

(Required) The SID of the parent [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) resource.

urlencoded.description: The [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) date when the Session should expire. If this is value is present, it overrides the `ttl` value.
The time, in seconds, when the session will expire. The time is measured from the last Session create or the Session's last Interaction.

request.description: Delete a specific Phone Number from a Service.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The SID of the parent [Service](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/service) of the PhoneNumber resource to fetch.
(Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the PhoneNumber resource to fetch.

request.description: Fetch a specific Phone Number.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: Whether the phone number should be reserved and not be assigned to a participant using proxy pool logic. See [Reserved Phone Numbers](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/reserved-phone-numbers) for more information.

variable.description: (Required) The SID of the parent [Service](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/service) of the PhoneNumber resource to update.
(Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the PhoneNumber resource to update.

request.description: Update a specific Proxy Number.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: Whether the phone number should be reserved and not be assigned to a participant using proxy pool logic. See [Reserved Phone Numbers](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/reserved-phone-numbers) for more information.

The SID of a Twilio [IncomingPhoneNumber](https://www.twilio.com/docs/phone-numbers/api/incomingphonenumber-resource) resource that represents the Twilio Number you would like to assign to your Proxy Service.

The phone number in [E.164](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164) format.  E.164 phone numbers consist of a + followed by the country code and subscriber number without punctuation characters. For example, +14155551234.

Whether the new phone number should be reserved and not be assigned to a participant using proxy pool logic. See [Reserved Phone Numbers](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/reserved-phone-numbers) for more information.

variable.description: (Required) The SID parent [Service](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/service) resource of the new PhoneNumber resource.

request.description: Add a Phone Number to a Service's Proxy Number Pool.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: The SID of a Twilio [IncomingPhoneNumber](https://www.twilio.com/docs/phone-numbers/api/incomingphonenumber-resource) resource that represents the Twilio Number you would like to assign to your Proxy Service.

The phone number in [E.164](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164) format.  E.164 phone numbers consist of a + followed by the country code and subscriber number without punctuation characters. For example, +14155551234.

Whether the new phone number should be reserved and not be assigned to a participant using proxy pool logic. See [Reserved Phone Numbers](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/reserved-phone-numbers) for more information.

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the Service resource to fetch.

request.description: Fetch a specific Service.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

variable.description: (Required) The Twilio-provided string that uniquely identifies the Service resource to delete.

request.description: Delete a specific Service.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

urlencoded.description: An application-defined string that uniquely identifies the resource. This value must be 191 characters or fewer in length and be unique. **This value should not have PII.**

The default `ttl` value to set for Sessions created in the Service. The TTL (time to live) is measured in seconds after the Session's last create or last Interaction. The default value of `0` indicates an unlimited Session length. You can override a Session's default TTL value by setting its `ttl` value.
The URL we should call when the interaction status changes.
The URL we call on each interaction. If we receive a 403 status, we block the interaction; otherwise the interaction continues.

The URL we should call when an inbound call or SMS action occurs on a closed or non-existent Session. If your server (or a Twilio [function](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/serverless/functions)) responds with valid [TwiML](https://www.twilio.com/docs/voice/twiml), we will process it. This means it is possible, for example, to play a message for a call, send an automated text message response, or redirect a call to another Phone Number. See [Out-of-Session Callback Response Guide](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/out-session-callback-response-guide) for more information.
The SID of the Chat Service Instance managed by Proxy Service. The Chat Service enables Proxy to forward SMS and channel messages to this chat instance. This is a one-to-one relationship.

request.description: Update a specific Service.
